prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS9 6.2L Supercharged V8 (GM engine code: LS9)** from the C6 Corvette ZR1, retaining the Riviera's front-wheel-drive layout via a **Holinger RD6 sequential transaxle** (modified for FWD applications) and a **GForce G-1200 9-inch differential** with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD**. Forced induction is upgraded with a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger** (2.3L rotor set) running 12 psi of boost, paired with a **custom intercooler core by PWR** (3.5" thick, 1000cfm airflow) and a **FAST XFI Sportsman ECU** with a **custom LS9-specific tune by Lingenfelter** targeting 750whp on E85.

Suspension overhaul using **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Riviera's 3,800lb weight), paired with **Eibach Pro-Street S springs** (1.5" drop) and **polyurethane bushings by Energy Suspension** (full set, including subframe mounts). Braking is handled by **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front, 355mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines**.

Exhaust system features a **custom 3.5" stainless steel setup by Stainless Works**, starting with **1.75" primary headers (equal-length, 4-2-1 merge collectors)** and terminating in a **dual-mode Borla Pro XS muffler** (valved for track/cruise modes). The fuel system is upgraded with **ID1000x injectors**, a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump**, and a **Radium Engineering dual-pump hanger** with **AEM 320LPH external pumps** for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Bodywork modifications include a **custom widebody kit by RK Sport** (Riviera-specific, 3.5" flares front/rear) with **carbon fiber fenders and quarter panels** (pre-preg autoclave construction). The front bumper is replaced with a **custom 3D-printed ABS unit** featuring a **functional splitter by APR Performance** (3" overhang, 50/50 aero balance) and **carbon fiber canards by Seibon**. The rear receives a **custom ducktail spoiler by DTM Composites** (22" tall, 3D-scanned for Riviera roofline) and a **diffuser by Varis** (5-element, 3D-printed titanium supports).

Wheels are **Forgeline GA3R 19x10.5" (front) and 19x12" (rear)** in a **custom brushed titanium finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)**. The wheel centers are shaved and redrilled for a **custom 5x114.3 bolt pattern** (converted from the stock 5x120.7mm). The brake calipers are painted **PPG Hot Rod Black** with **gold anodized pistons** and **custom laser-etched Buick tri-shield logos**.

Interior features **Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara inserts) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and a **custom roll cage by Autopower** (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly). The dashboard is replaced with a **custom carbon fiber unit by Varis** housing a **Motec C127 dash logger**, while the steering wheel is a **NRG Innovations R3** (suede, quick-release) with a **custom Buick tri-shield horn button**. The door cards are reupholstered in **Alcantara with red stitching** and feature **carbon fiber door pulls by Seibon**.
